summary: Validated both backend and frontend for the new History page and wallet-pass checklist flow on the public preview URL. Requested features and proxy endpoint regressions passed.
action_items: No blocking defects found in requested scope.
Optional hardening: escape/encode the inline onclick payload used by History drilldown buttons to avoid edge-case quote breakage with unusual market names.
critical_code_review_comments: history.js uses inline onclick with JSON.stringify(group.market) in HTML attributes; market names containing quotes could break handler parsing. Consider data-* attributes + delegated listeners.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested on https://quick-fix-71.preview.emergentagent.com (from frontend/.env). Confirmed top-nav History renders checklist/stats/filters/drilldowns area, settings save creates visible 'Trading settings' timeline item in history list, search/category filtering works, export action does not break UI, markets still load, and status banner remains visible. Wallet signature approval/live order execution remains untestable in automation due to missing wallet extension.
rca of the issue: No functional regressions reproduced in this run. One transient Playwright browser crash (SIGSEGV) occurred during a rerun but immediate retry succeeded with the same validations.
mocked_api: NO MOCKED APIs used in this testing run
